name: super-video-maker-skill
description: Agent skill package for end-to-end AI video production.

scripts.remotion:render: cd remotion-template && npx remotion render src/index.ts CaptionedTalkingHead out/captioned.mp4 --props=public/render-props.json
scripts.hyperframes:preview: cd hyperframes-template && npx hyperframes preview compositions/demo.html
scripts.hyperframes:render: cd hyperframes-template && npx hyperframes render compositions/demo.html --output out/demo.mp4
